2606.14703.title: Gaze Heads: How VLMs Look at What They Describe
2606.14703.paper_summary: How a vision-language model internally solves the task of describing an image is far from obvious. We find that the model develops a specific mechanism for this: a small set of attention heads in its language-model backbone, which we call gaze heads, whose attention tracks the image region the model is currently describing. We find them with a simple correlation score from a few forward passes, using comic strips as a controlled testbed where narrative order is laid out spatially. These gaze heads do not just track the image tokens being described: redirecting their attention to a chosen region forces the VLM to describe that region instead. A single attention-mask intervention on the top-100 gaze heads, fewer than 9% of all heads, steers the model's answer to any chosen comic panel at 83.1% accuracy, while the same intervention on random heads fails to redirect the answer, and intervening on all heads destroys generation. The same lever also extends to continuous control: switching the gaze target mid-generation makes the model wrap up its current panel description and move to the new one within a few tokens. Beyond comics, the same intervention redirects answers to chosen regions in natural COCO images. The mechanism further recurs across model sizes from 2B to 32B parameters and across other VLM architectures, although some frozen-encoder families show no comparable head set. More broadly, this shows that targeted edits identified through mechanistic analysis can serve as practical inference-time levers for steering multimodal model behavior, without any retraining. Our code, interactive demo, and datasets are available at https://gaze.baulab.info/
2606.14703.paper_summary_zh: 如何讓視覺-語言模型在內部解決描述圖像的任務並不明顯。<lb/>我們發現模型為此開發了一種特定的機制：在其語言模型主幹中有一小組注意力頭，我們稱之為凝視頭，這些頭的注意力追踪模型當前正在描述的圖像區域。<lb/>我們通過簡單的相關性評分和幾次前向傳遞來找到它們，使用漫畫條作為控制測試平台，其中敘事順序在空間上被佈局。<lb/>這些凝視頭不僅追踪被描述的圖像標記：將它們的注意力重新導向到選定區域會迫使VLM改為描述該區域。<lb/>對於前100個凝視頭進行單次注意力遮罩干預，這些頭不到所有頭的9%，能以83.1%的準確率引導模型的回答到任何選定的漫畫面板，而對隨機頭的相同干預無法重新導向答案，對所有頭的干預則會破壞生成。<lb/>同樣的杠杆也擴展到連續控制：在生成過程中切換凝視目標會使模型結束當前面板的描述並在幾個標記內移動到新的面板。<lb/>超越漫畫，這種干預也能將答案重新導向到自然COCO圖像中的選定區域。<lb/>這一機制在從2B到32B參數的模型大小中進一步重現，並且在其他VLM架構中也如此，儘管一些固定編碼器系列顯示沒有可比的頭集。<lb/>更廣泛地說，這表明通過機制分析識別的有針對性的編輯可以作為實用的推理時間杠杆來引導多模態模型行為，而無需任何重新訓練。<lb/>我們的代碼、互動演示和數據集可在 https://gaze.baulab.info/ 獲得。
2606.14703.author: Rohit Gandikota et.al.
